topics.title: Summer House Season 10 Reunion Part 3 airs today — West Wilson had a secret girlfriend the entire time
topics.summary: Reunion Part 3 airs June 9, 2026. West Wilson was literally dating someone named Meija Moreno last summer while filming — she confirmed they were in an exclusive relationship. One week after his WWHL appearance, he and Amanda went public. Both Amanda and West admitted they '100% lied' to Ciara. Amanda walked off set saying she felt 'embarrassed.' Kyle and Ciara confronted Meija on screen.
topics.angle: The chaos isn't the drama. The chaos IS the design flaw. When partnership is built on vibes and denial instead of honesty and intention, you end up on a Bravo couch admitting you lied to your best friend on national television. LLMA is what partnership design looks like BEFORE that couch.

topics.title: Ariana Grande and Ethan Slater break up after years of public scrutiny
topics.summary: Ariana Grande and Ethan Slater have ended their relationship in June 2026. She left her husband for him in 2023 amid massive public backlash. Now they've quietly split and sources say they remain 'supportive friends.' She blew up a marriage, absorbed years of internet hate, and ended up... single with a polite press release.
topics.angle: What if the 'love story' society demands you have is actually the thing destroying your actual life? LLMA asks: what if you got to design your partnership structure before the chaos, not after?

topics.title: Gen Z spends 156 hours a year on dating apps — and gets 6 meaningful connections
topics.summary: A February 2026 study found Gen Z spends 156 hours annually on dating apps with an average of only 6 meaningful connections. Over half report burnout. Interest in lavender marriages has surged 200% since 2020, driven by economic hardship, dating fatigue, and desire for emotional stability over romantic performance.
topics.angle: 156 hours for 6 connections is worse ROI than crypto in 2022. Gen Z is already doing the math and pivoting to platonic partnership. LLMA is the vocabulary they're missing.

pop_culture_hook: Summer House Part 3 reunion airs tonight and West Wilson had a WHOLE girlfriend while pursuing Amanda. Both of them lied to Ciara. Amanda walked off set. This is what unintentional partnership design looks like on national television.
